name: Maple Sponge Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 9x9-inch pan and set aside.
2. In a heavy, 2-quart saucepan, combine the maple-flavored syrup, sugar, and white vinegar.
3. Bring to boiling over medium heat, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
4. Continue cooking without stirring until it reaches the hard crack stage (300°F).
5. Remove from heat; stir in the baking soda and mix well.
6. Immediately pour into the buttered pan.
7. Do not spread the candy.
8. Allow to cool completely, then break into pieces.
Makes about 1/2 pound of candy.
